Shield of the Immaculate  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: BACK SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10
SV DISEASE: +25
Effect: Cure Disease (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
Recast Delay: 1 seconds, Recast Type: -1
WT: 7.3 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Shield of the Immaculate
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: BACK SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10
SV DISEASE: +25
Effect: Cure Disease (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
Recast Delay: 1 seconds, Recast Type: -1
WT: 7.3 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:9 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1320
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 19:43:46
Page Updated:Wed Mar 22nd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 95,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name

It's castable / clickable on any player just like the spell. If you do not have a player targetted, it will auto-cast on yourself.

2 WEEKS!
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2014 at 1:36 PM Rating: Decent
Nazlak
27 posts
It took me 2 weeks of almost 24-7 camping to get 2 of these to drop. I have seen this named only spawn once in a 28 hour period and other times I could get 5 spawns in a day. I think there is a anti camp code involved. I would get more spawns when I would switch out my character camping this spot or just log for a bit.

Sir Nazlak Kalzan, Troll Gravelord
Torv
▲ Page top
2 WEEKS!
QuoteReply
# May 16 2016 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent
EnvyEyes
133 posts
I must have gotten very lucky. With the aim of getting at least one more of these for my alt(s), I headed up to PoHate. Checked and the chest was up. Dispatched it quickly and the shield was on him. 5 mins in and out with my rogue and I now have a spare to share around.

▲ Page top
still drops
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2014 at 6:06 PM Rating: Default
Zaztik
648 posts
still drops as of 4-19-2014.

it was a loooong camp but not too bad. i left my cleric bot in the eerie chest room with the volume up while i played my main in another window. every 29 min or so i would hear him getting beat on so i'd just alt-tab back to the cleric and kill the ph or eerie.

in 4-5ish days of camping it on and off, i saw close to 20 eerie chests: 2 eyes of inny, tons of the pally shield and 4 ranger whips. i think they upped the spawn rate on him because i did see him quite a lot.

.
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2014 at 6:01 PM Rating: Decent

4 posts

Edited, Apr 19th 2014 8:04pm by SullustOrgana
▲ Page top
rare but not rarest
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2012 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
infyranna
Scholar
38 posts
I farm the rarest of the rares all over Norrath for about 7 years now, and after camping this many many times I have realized that the shield of the immaculate is very rare indeed and will take you up to 3 days or more sometimes to get one, but that paly only shield that this mob drops is by far more rare. I would say I have gotten around 10 shields of the immaculate through the years and I have only seen the ribcage erudite paly only shield drop twice. Not super useful info I just thought it was interesting.. So if you see it for sale in bazaar for 5k or more even though it is a lame stat item your paying for one of the rarest drops i have ever seen in eq
▲ Page top
17 Sep 2012
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2012 at 6:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1647821783460
Scholar
42 posts
Dropped today 17 Sep 2012.

About 50 hours over a weeks time, off and on camping. Kill PH, set timer on phone for 29 min and go on with life.
No more than a dozen an eerie chest spawns.

Edited, Sep 17th 2012 8:50am by juston3
▲ Page top
Al'Kabor Info ONLY
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2012 at 9:40 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1609719425741
Scholar
263 posts
Al'Kabor info ONLY. (This shield drops off of an Eerie Chest PC side)

This shield is a confirmed drop off of both Inny and the Lord of Ire. Rare to very rare on Inny, VERY rare on the Lord of Ire. If the Lord of Ire has it, there will be NO graphic, so you must kill each and every last spawn of him till it drops and hope you get lucky.

It is clickable from inventory by all classes. Good luck camping.
▲ Page top
shield
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2011 at 4:31 PM Rating: Decent
infyranna
Scholar
38 posts
Everyone wonders why this goes for so much plat, but if you actually tried farming this you would know why. Yes sometimes you can get lucky and get it in a short farm time, but it usually takes a couple days to get one. I know this because I have farmed 4 so far. So if you want one of the neatest clickies in the game, either go farm it for hours upon hours or cough up 100k, pure and simple.
▲ Page top
Ranger Epic
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2009 at 11:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594571731278
View User Forum
28 posts
While camping for the ranger epic (Shattered Emerald of Corruption) I spent a couple days here in Hate. I just made a big circle killing all PH's for mini bosses. They all share the same 30 min timer. Got a lot of crap for the most part. Lots and lots of research components. Lots of the old hate gear (read: useless) I spent approx 3 days, unknown hours. Finally, the seoc dropped from Magi and I brought my ranger up to loot it. While I was getting ready to leave the zone, I quickly checked tracking again and viola! There was the eerie chest.. which hadn't spawned at all during my time here. I almost missed it.. and I would have been really peeved, since it did drop the Shield. So, I haven't decided whether to keep or sell it. I could really use the cash since the economy is soooo bad these days. I do mean the eq economy.

Anyway, I am on Emarr and if you are interested, gimme a tell and make an offer. You can send a tell to anyone in the guild "Stygian Rush"

Cheers
▲ Page top
Ranger Epic
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2012 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
shlabber
4 posts
Vorpil wrote:
While camping for the ranger epic (Shattered Emerald of Corruption) I spent a couple days here in Hate. I just made a big circle killing all PH's for mini bosses. They all share the same 30 min timer. Got a lot of crap for the most part. Lots and lots of research components. Lots of the old hate gear (read: useless)


Not really useless. You can turn old world planar armor in to guild masters in PoK for a random valuable gem (diamond, ruby, jacinth, etc).

cure disease clicky
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2006 at 3:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781202386
11 posts
This is useful against certain mobs/encounters like AMV in CoA. AMV has a DT ae with 9 disease counters. if not cured you are a gonner. 3 clickys of this takes 3 secs and you are cured. Very handy for classes with no cures.

info please
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2006 at 7:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592271250542
9 posts
well at least this overpriced lil item has SOME real function, better than the AoN which is a useless piece of crap , and should be removed from the game IMHO because the AoN campers ***** up too many epic spawns >< Yes MINOR cure disease can be useful, but remember it"s MINOR cure, if you're high enough level that you can afford to pay 200pp for it, the disease's you get hit with are most likely gonna take a ton of 1 sec (NOT insta-clicky) casts. I swear, if you can click an item out of inventory, for some reason unimformed people get over-excited, and will pay way too much for it.But hey, if one drops for you, and you can find one of P.T.Barnums people to buy it, more power to ya.
Funny, in all these posts I never saw anyone who KEPT the damn thing, they all were camping to sell it.If its so good and useful, lets see some who camped it , use it and are gushing about how it saved the whole raid.. at 200K it better.

2 posts
well this is a lil off the subject , but this item and the AoN are pretty much required items for a pvp server , clickys save your life against players trying to pell ya. so of corse Mr.Blubie server has know idea what he's talking about. Oh and ask for this lil item on a PvP server. this item stips Crimson potions making people mezzable, so to a any Mezzer on Zek this item is priceless.

wtf?
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2006 at 6:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786296501
30 posts
Maybe someone can help me understand WHY this is so flippin' expensive? 200 plus k for it on Druzzil Ro, almost 300k on Drinal . . .. Ok, so it's got a clicky cure disease, but it only cures MINOR diseases, which by the time you get this you're going to be dealing with much higher diseases. *shrugs* Just my opinion, but I don't see why it's going to be so expensive an item except that after spending so much time camping it, you're frustrated. lol
▲ Page top
wtf?
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2007 at 6:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256178734
Scholar
421 posts
Nasthes,

First you must understand that when you get a spell with counters, such as Fine Red Mist
from the chest in Demi Plane of Blood...
Quote:
1: Increase Disease Counter by 50
2: Decrease Hitpoints by 2250 per tick
Type: PB AE
Duration: 1 hour
AE Radius: 150

that 2250 DoT for an HOUR will kill people fast. Each click of this item removes 4 counters. Once all 50 are gone the DoT is removed. So in 13 clicks You can cure yourself. At 1 click per second You only have to take 2 ticks of damage.

Last weekend we had an idiot set off this DoT. I cured myself and 3 others, the last guy was at 0% HP. I save 4 deaths. I am an enchanter. Add to that events like AMV in COA which has a DIS cureable Death Touch and this has been well worth the 50k I paid for it.
▲ Page top
wtf?
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2006 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
mostly because of rarity, and that anyone can click it from inventory.
Running through WoS and get caught in Hulcror's dot.
Can just keep clicking shield until enough disease counters have been wiped.
Anyone can cure disease off themselves.
